arts.ttl: Cedric Itten refuses to follow Rangers script as he raves about Celtic fans but bonkers 62-year record looms large
arts.sum: The big striker returns to Glasgow where he spent two years

arts.ttl: Ex-Celtic boss Ange still has ‘full’ Spurs board backing despite dismal form
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou may be under pressure from supporters, but it’s thought that the Spurs board still believe in him.

arts.ttl: When Celtic play Raith Rovers in the Scottish Cup also determines key Champions League date
arts.sum: However, Brendan Rodgers is also fighting on the European front as the Celtic manager looks to book his place in the play-off places with a home win over Young Boys at Celtic Park . However, now that Celtic’s date with Raith Rovers in the cup is confirmed, it will also determine when they could play in the next round of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Fans told timeline of when Arsenal's Kieran Tierney 'will' become a Celtic player
arts.sum: But now, it seems that the return of Tierney to Celtic ‘will’ happen as journalist, Roger Hannah, delivers a timeline of when the Arsenal defender will ‘be in the building’ as a Hoops player. Ever since Tierney was told by Arsenal that they wouldn’t be extending his contract at the club, the speculation surrounding a return to Celtic Park has been ramping up over the last few weeks.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher gives flowers to Celtic hero who is now bossing it in the Premier League
arts.sum: It’s always a step down in pressure when you leave a club like Celtic and it wasn’t an easy call from the versatile midfielder. It’s never easy leaving a club like Celtic, but many have done it with differing results.

arts.ttl: Lesson for Dundalk as Usher Celtic grab late winner in Leinster Senior Cup clash
arts.sum: From the outside it would be easy to look at a result like this and have concern but the reality is the Dundalk side which lines up for the season opener is likely to have a much different look with Mayowa Animasahun, Sean Keogh and Daryl Horgan all withdrawn at half-time and the likes of Enda Minogue and Norman Garbett yet to feature. However, Usher were gifted a route back into it by referee Mark Moynihan on 70 minutes when Aodh Dervin was harshly adjudged to have fouled Keith Ashmore in the box before Graham Curran levelled from the penalty spot despite Safaei going the right way.

Celtic responded to their Old Firm loss by going on a five-game unbeaten run, winning four times in that streak. The Bhoys are unbeaten in four in the Champions League but have drawn three times in th...

arts.ttl: What Celtic are doing in the transfer window has Barry Ferguson worried
arts.sum: With Celtic linked to a move for Arsenal defender Kieran Tierney, it’s not what the Parkhead club are doing in terms of incomings that has former Rangers captain, Barry Ferguson, worried. Young Celtic B talent Aiden Haddow has departed for Hearts and the Hoops also sold Alexandro Bernabei for a very good profit after the Argentinian’s impressive loan spell at Internacional.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery fires ominous Celtic warning as he rips apart Champions League claim about Aston Villa
arts.sum: The Villa boss has set his side a target of six points from the two matches to ensure they finish in the top eight

arts.ttl: Arne Engels insists Celtic pressure is no problem as record signing lifts lid on Brendan Rodgers and Callum McGregor help
arts.sum: Belgian midfielder remains under the microscope after his £11m summer move but insists he's comfortable with the price tag and ready to prove his worth on the big stage.
